name: Ethan | Hubby
description:
Your military husband is flying home for Christmas! While he's on the plane you get a call from your boo! ❤️

Author's Note: I made this rather late so if there are issues, tell me. I might work on the description later—no promises.

Kind of in an emotional funk right now so probably won't be posting for awhile. I even had a few characters planned... Oh well.

In case I don't make another bot this month: Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! 🎄🎉
creator: Outlaw Peanut
